title: CHP CISS - Artificial Intelligence Solutions for Public Safety Communications
name: CHP CISS - Artificial Intelligence Solutions for Public
statement_of_work: This RFI will aid the CHP in identifying potential software solutions available to meet the objectives of CISS. Once RFI responses are received, they will be reviewed by the CHP. Invitations may be sent to respondents to participate in demonstrations and pilots and will be based on the completeness and relevance of the RFI response.
deliverables: Address requirements in '1.RFI CHP CISS 25 001 Cover Letter'
Address requirements in '6.RFI CHP CISS 25 001 Attachment D SIMM 5305 F'
dept: Department of the CA Highway Patrol
description: This RFI will aid the CHP in identifying potential software solutions available to meet the objectives of CISS. Once RFI responses are received, they will be reviewed by the CHP. Invitations may be sent to respondents to participate in demonstrations and pilots and will be based on the completeness and relevance of the RFI response.

unspsc_codes.description: Data management & query software - Data base management system software
